title: IIMB Notification 2026 - Apply Online for Various Academic Associate Posts
description: Indian Institute of Management Bangalore (IIMB) has announced the official notification for the recruitment of various Academic Associate Jobs. Candidates who have qualified in the Post-Graduation can grab this chance and apply for the IIMB Notification 2026 . Here, we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply before the last date of application. If you are loo...
